context: Tests whether the agent handles bad_prompt errors by using prompt_suggestion from the error, handles bad_composition_plan errors by using composition_plan_suggestion, keeps prompts free of specific artist or band names, correctly separates description (high-level direction) from tags (style cues) in video_to_music calls, and does not pass both prompt and composition_plan to compose().

checklist.name: bad_prompt retry with suggestion
checklist.description: Script catches a bad_prompt error and retries the compose() call using the prompt_suggestion value extracted from the error response

checklist.name: Accesses prompt_suggestion field
checklist.description: Error handling code explicitly reads a field named prompt_suggestion (or similar) from the caught exception/error object to obtain the retry prompt

checklist.name: No hardcoded artist names in prompts
checklist.description: No specific artist names, band names, or copyrighted song/album titles appear as literal strings in any prompt or description passed to the API

checklist.name: video_to_music description parameter
checklist.description: The score sub-command passes the user's overall musical narrative as the description parameter to video_to_music(), not as part of tags

checklist.name: video_to_music tags parameter
checklist.description: The score sub-command passes short style/mood keywords as the tags parameter (a list) to video_to_music()

checklist.name: Tags are a list
checklist.description: tags is passed as a Python list of individual strings (e.g. ['cinematic', 'ambient']) — not as a single comma-joined string

checklist.name: Audio saved via chunk iteration
checklist.description: For the generate sub-command, audio is saved by iterating over the returned stream (for chunk in audio) and writing each chunk

checklist.name: Retry message printed
checklist.description: Script prints a message to stdout indicating when a content-policy retry was triggered

checklist.name: Environment variable for API key
checklist.description: ElevenLabs client is instantiated without a hardcoded API key — relies on ELEVENLABS_API_KEY from the environment

checklist.name: Correct Python package import
checklist.description: Script imports from 'elevenlabs' package and requirements.txt lists 'elevenlabs'
